segments.text: Nair to arrow is safe though
segments.original_text: 空中ニュートラルから弓矢は大丈夫ですね

segments.text: Here with nair to arrow—what's the play?
segments.original_text: ここどうするか空中ニュートラル弓矢

segments.text: That's up B, but the up B didn't connect
segments.original_text: これは上Bであっと上Bは届かなかった

full_text: Nair to arrow is safe though Here with nair to arrow—what's the play? That's up B, but the up B didn't connect
